summary: First test run for DunaSavvy. All 8 backend pytest cases passed (health, demo default/gouging/address_mismatch/auth_required, /api/compare custom totals + winner, cart ingest+get no _id leak, fuzzy-match). Frontend Playwright test fully passed: header 'DunaSavvy', hero 'One cart. Three platforms.', 3 platform columns, address banner, scenario switching (default/gouging/address_mismatch/auth_required) all visibly update, Ghost Cart + Install sections rendered, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL used (no localhost).

issues: In default scenario the 'Price gouging detected' panel fires because Grubhub prices are ~15% above median. This is correct engine behavior but may look contradictory next to the 'Address synced / Best total' messaging — consider renaming default scenario data or tuning threshold for the demo.

action_items: MISSING /app/extension directory: The UI Install section and copy-btn advertise loading '/app/extension', but that folder does not exist in the repo. Main agent should create the Chrome MV3 extension files (manifest.json, background.js, content.js, popup/*, icons/*) as promised in the PRD — otherwise the 'Install extension' CTA is misleading.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers.

detect_gouging runs on every /compare including the default demo, producing a 'gouging detected' panel in the default happy-path scenario — consider gating by scenario or raising threshold for the default demo data.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; fine for dev but tighten for production.
compare() persists every comparison to MongoDB unconditionally — add TTL index or cap to avoid unbounded growth.
seed_data_creation: None (used TEST_ prefixed session_id for cart ingest test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 pytest backend tests and full Playwright frontend smoke currently green against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Main outstanding gap is the missing /app/extension folder referenced by the UI.
